title: Infosys Receives CGST Penalty Order for FY 2018-19 ITC Matter
detailed_summary: Infosys received a communication from the Joint Commissioner of CGST for collection of a penalty totaling INR 23,08,904/-. The matter relates to alleged excess availment of ITC in GSTR-3B compared with ITC reflected in GSTR-2A for FY 2018-19. Infosys stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a total penalty of INR 23,08,904/- from the Joint Commissioner of CGST.
The penalty relates to alleged excess availment of ITC in GSTR-3B in comparison to ITC reflecting in GSTR-2A for FY 2018-19.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on the financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Orders passed/action taken for alleged excess availment of ITC in GSTR-3B in comparison to ITC reflecting in GSTR-2A for FY 2018-19.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated business and financial impact.

sample_questions: What CGST penalty did Infosys disclose for FY 2018-19?
Did Infosys say the INR 23,08,904 CGST penalty has any material impact?
